TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: Kal Čv Čnga
TEXT.citation: Kal Čv Čnga. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Atayal]. https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kal Čv Čnga
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kal Čv Čnga, title = Kal Čv Čnga, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kal Čv Čnga} }

S.FORM: alang Kal Čv Čnga/Ngani ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 252 buwan, 825 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 739 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Tayan 1%, Cou 3%, Hla'aluwa 4%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kal Čv Čnga hya' ga Tanguhla. tay mkyahu' na Kal Čv Čnga hya' ga Su'aci. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "tuqi'"qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kal Čv Čnga/Ngani ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 252 buwan, 825 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 739 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 86 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Tayan 1%, Cou 3%, Hla'aluwa 4%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kal Čv Čnga hya' ga Tanguhla. tay mkyahu' na Kal Čv Čnga hya' ga Su'aci. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. 'llaw balay ktan qu qalang myan. baqun tmnga' kwara' rgryax nya'. tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "tuqi'"qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kal***Ňča/Ňčani …£a nija mki s~…ēku takaw s~…ēi atu toweŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, tajan *%, ¶~ ®ou *%, ńßla Ēaluwa *%, pajwan *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na kal***Ňča ńßja Ē …£a taŇčuńßla. taj mkjańßu Ē na kal***Ňča ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i. s~…ēquliq ka minkańßul te ńßu…£al …£a, ő≤laq nńßa Ē mwańß r…£jax. Ēllaw ő≤alaj ktan qu qalaŇč mjan. ő≤aqun tmŇča Ē kwara Ē r…£rjax nja Ē. tuqi Ēs~…ēan uŇčat kis~…ēja Ē nja Ē. "tuqi Ē"qu s~…ēpzjaŇč …£l…£aŇč nńßa qalaŇč mus~…ēa Ē ana inu Ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
